---
title: "besoegsdag_4"
subtitle: "`besoegsdag_4`"
description: "besoegsdag_4"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/besoegsdag_4/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                                    | Title                                 | Type     | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|-----------------------------------------|---------------------------------------|----------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                                 | The unique name of the event          | string   | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `center`                                | Research center                       | string   | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `date_v4`                               | date_v4                               | date     | Date of visit. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `staff_initials_v4`                     | staff_initials_v4                     | string   | Initials of the study staff member responsible for conducting the visit. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `identified_name_cpr_v4`                | identified_name_cpr_v4                | string   | Indicates whether the participant has been identified by full name and personal identification number (CPR). Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `relative_v4`                           | relative_v4                           | string   | Indicates whether a relative or accompanying person is present at the visit. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `relative_name_v4`                      | relative_name_v4                      | string   | The name of the relative attending the visit. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `fasting_status_v4`                     | fasting_status_v4                     | string   | Indicates if the participant has been fasting since 10 pm the night before. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `last_meal_time_v4`                     | last_meal_time_v4                     | datetime | Indicates the time of the participant's last meal before the visit. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `food_intake_nonfast_v4`                | food_intake_nonfast_v4                | string   | Indicates what food and when the participant has eaten it, if the participant has not been fasting from 10 pm the day before the visit. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `alcohol_v4`                            | alcohol_v4                            | string   | Indicates if the participant has avoided alcohol the past 24 hours. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `alcohol_intake_v4`                     | alcohol_intake_v4                     | string   | Indicates how much alcohol the participants has had and when the past 24 hours. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `caffeine_v4`                           | caffeine_v4                           | string   | Indicates if the participant has avoided caffeinated beverages the past 24 hours. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `caffeine_intake_v4`                    | caffeine_intake_v4                    | string   | Indicates how much caffeine the participants has had and when the past 24 hours. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `no_exercise_24h_v4`                    | no_exercise_24h_v4                    | string   | Indicates if the participant did any intense activity or excercise the past 24 hours. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `exercise_24h_v4`                       | exercise_24h_v4                       | string   | Indicates how much intense activity or exercise the participant did and when the past 24 hours. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `smoking_v4`                            | smoking_v4                            | string   | Indicates if the participant has avoided smoking since the night before. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `smoking_amount_v4`                     | smoking_amount_v4                     | string   | Indicates how much smoking the participant has done and when since last night. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `no_medication_before_v4`               | no_medication_before_v4               | string   | Indicates if the participant took medication the morning before the visit. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `medication_before_v4`                  | medication_before_v4                  | string   | Description of the medication the participant took the morning before the visit. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `not_active_transportation_v4`          | not_active_transportation_v4          | string   | Indicates if the participant used motorized/not-active transportation to SDCC before the visit. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `transportation_v4`                     | transportation_v4                     | string   | Description of the active transportation before the visit. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `saliva_sample_v4`                      | saliva_sample_v4                      | string   | Indicates if the participant has delivered a saliva sample. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `urin_sample_v4`                        | urin_sample_v4                        | string   | Indicates if the participant has delivered a urin sample done at the day of the visit. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `hba1c_v4`                              | hba1c_v4                              | string   | Indicates if the participant has had HbA1c taken. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `hba1c_value_v4`                        | hba1c_value_v4                        | number   | HbA1c value, mmol/mol, visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `type_of_clothing_whr_v4`               | type_of_clothing_whr_v4               | string   | Indicates what type of clothing the participant is wearing during the waist and hip measurements. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `waist_1_v4`                            | waist_1_v4                            | number   | Waist measurement 1 in cm. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `waist_2_v4`                            | waist_2_v4                            | number   | Waist measurement 2 in cm. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `waist_average_v4`                      | waist_average_v4                      | string   | The average of the waist measurements in cm. Visit 4. Derived using the formula: ([waist_1_v4]+[waist_2_v4])/2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `hip_1_v4`                              | hip_1_v4                              | number   | Hip measurement 1 in cm. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `hip_2_v4`                              | hip_2_v4                              | number   | Hip measurement 2 in cm. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `hip_average_v4`                        | hip_average_v4                        | string   | The average of the two hip measurements in cm. Visit 4. Derived using the formula: ([hip_1_v4]+[hip_2_v4])/2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `waist_hip_ratio_v4`                    | waist_hip_ratio_v4                    | string   | The waist hip ratio in cm. Calculated using the average of the 2 waist measurements and 2 hip measurements. Visit 4. Derived using the formula: [waist_average_v4]/[hip_average_v4]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `dxa_metal_v4`                          | dxa_metal_v4                          | string   | Indicates whether the participant has any metal parts in their body. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `dxa_which_metal_v4`                    | dxa_which_metal_v4                    | string   | Indicates the type of metal in the participants body, if any. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `dxa_contraindicated_v4`                | dxa_contraindicated_v4                | string   | Indicates whether the participant has had contrast fluid injected within the past week. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `pregnancy_test_v4`                     | pregnancy_test_v4                     | string   | Indicates if the participant can be pregnant. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `pregnancy_test_result_v4`              | pregnancy_test_result_v4              | string   | Indicates if the pregnancy test was positive or negative. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `empty_bladder_v4`                      | empty_bladder_v4                      | string   | Indicates if the partcipant has emptied bladder before DXA. Workflow. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `height_v4`                             | height_v4                             | string   | Participant's height in meters, measured with a stadiometer to the nearest 0.1 cm. Visit 4. Derived using the formula: [besg_1__screening_arm_1][height_v1]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `weight_v4`                             | weight_v4                             | number   | Participant's weight in kilograms, measured with light clothing using a digital scale. Measured to the nearest 0.1 kg. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `weight_room_v4`                        | weight_room_v4                        | string   | Indicates which scale in which room that was used for weighing the participant. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `weight_garmin_v4`                      | weight_garmin_v4                      | number   | The participant's weight on the digital Garmin scale in the participant's home. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `bmi_v4`                                | bmi_v4                                | string   | Body Mass Index (BMI) in kg/m², calculated from weight and height. Visit 4. Derived using the formula: round(([weight_v4])/(([height_v4])^(2)), 1)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `dxa_performed_v4`                      | dxa_performed_v4                      | string   | Indicates if the DXA is perfomed. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `staff_initials_dxa_v4`                 | staff_initials_dxa_v4                 | string   | Initials of the study staff member responsible for conducting the DXA scan. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `dxa_upload_ldrive_v4`                  | dxa_upload_ldrive_v4                  | string   | DXA results saved on L-drive. Workflow. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `dxa_upload_v4`                         | dxa_upload_v4                         | string   | DXA data upload. Workflow. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `food_pref_test_performed_v4`           | food_pref_test_performed_v4           | string   | Indicates if the participant has performed the food preference test. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `food_pref_test_glasses_v4`             | food_pref_test_glasses_v4             | string   | Indicates if the participant has performed the test with or without glasses. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `fibro_performed_v4`                    | fibro_performed_v4                    | string   | FibroScan performed. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `fibro_not_performed_why_v4`            | fibro_not_performed_why_v4            | string   | Indicates why the fibro scan was not perfomed in case it is not. Visit 4                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `fibro_probe_size_v4`                   | fibro_probe_size_v4                   | string   | Indicates the size of the probe used for the fibro scan. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `staff_initials_fibro_v4`               | staff_initials_fibro_v4               | string   | Initials of the study staff member responsible for conducting the fibro scan. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `fibro_upload_ldrive_v4`                | fibro_upload_ldrive_v4                | string   | Indicates whetner or not the fibroscan is saved on the L-drive. Workflow. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `fibro_upload_v4`                       | fibro_upload_v4                       | string   | Fibroscan data upload. Workflow. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `bp_chosen_arm_v4`                      | bp_chosen_arm_v4                      | string   | Arm used for  blood pressure measurements. Visit 4. Derived using the formula: [besg_2_arm_1][bp_chosen_arm_v2]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `sys_bp_1_v4`                           | sys_bp_1_v4                           | number   | Systolic blood pressure in mmHg, first measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 10 minutes of rest. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `dia_bp_1_v4`                           | dia_bp_1_v4                           | number   | Diastolic blood pressure in mmHg, first measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `pulse_1_v4`                            | pulse_1_v4                            | number   | Pulse in bpm first measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `sys_bp_2_v4`                           | sys_bp_2_v4                           | number   | Systolic blood pressure in mmHg, second measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `dia_bp_2_v4`                           | dia_bp_2_v4                           | number   | Diastolic blood pressure in mmHg, second measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `pulse_2_v4`                            | pulse_2_v4                            | number   | Pulse in bpm second measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `sys_bp_3_v4`                           | sys_bp_3_v4                           | number   | Systolic blood pressure in mmHg, third measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `dia_bp_3_v4`                           | dia_bp_3_v4                           | number   | Systolic blood pressure in mmHg, third measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `pulse_3_v4`                            | pulse_3_v4                            | number   | Pulse in bpm third measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `sys_bp_avg_2lowest_v4`                 | sys_bp_avg_2lowest_v4                 | string   | Automatically calculated as the mean of the three systolic BP measurements. Visit 4. Derived using the formula: if( ( if([sys_bp_1_v4] <> "", 1, 0) + if([sys_bp_2_v4] <> "", 1, 0) + if([sys_bp_3_v4] <> "", 1, 0) ) > 0,  ( if([sys_bp_1_v4] <> "", [sys_bp_1_v4], 0) + if([sys_bp_2_v4] <> "", [sys_bp_2_v4], 0) + if([sys_bp_3_v4] <> "", [sys_bp_3_v4], 0) ) / ( if([sys_bp_1_v4] <> "", 1, 0) + if([sys_bp_2_v4] <> "", 1, 0) + if([sys_bp_3_v4] <> "", 1, 0) ),  "" )  |
| `dia_bp_avg_v4`                         | dia_bp_avg_v4                         | string   | Automatically calculated as the mean of the three diastolic BP measurements. Visit 4. Derived using the formula: if( ( if([dia_bp_1_v4] <> "", 1, 0) + if([dia_bp_2_v4] <> "", 1, 0) + if([dia_bp_3_v4] <> "", 1, 0) ) > 0,  ( if([dia_bp_1_v4] <> "", [dia_bp_1_v4], 0) + if([dia_bp_2_v4] <> "", [dia_bp_2_v4], 0) + if([dia_bp_3_v4] <> "", [dia_bp_3_v4], 0) ) / ( if([dia_bp_1_v4] <> "", 1, 0) + if([dia_bp_2_v4] <> "", 1, 0) + if([dia_bp_3_v4] <> "", 1, 0) ),  "" ) |
| `pulse_avg_v4`                          | pulse_avg_v4                          | string   | Automatically calculated as the mean of the three pulse measurements. Bpm. Visit 4. Derived using the formula: if( ( if([pulse_1_v4] <> "", 1, 0) + if([pulse_2_v4] <> "", 1, 0) + if([pulse_3_v4] <> "", 1, 0) ) > 0,  ( if([pulse_1_v4] <> "", [pulse_1_v4], 0) + if([pulse_2_v4] <> "", [pulse_2_v4], 0) + if([pulse_3_v4] <> "", [pulse_3_v4], 0) ) / ( if([pulse_1_v4] <> "", 1, 0) + if([pulse_2_v4] <> "", 1, 0) + if([pulse_3_v4] <> "", 1, 0) ),  "" )               |
| `finapres_arm_cuff_size_v4`             | finapres_arm_cuff_size_v4             | string   | Finapres measurement: Size of arm cuff (S, M or L) at visit 2. Visit 4. Derived using the formula: [besg_2_arm_1][finapres_arm_cuff_size_v2]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `finapres_finger_cuff_size_v4`          | finapres_finger_cuff_size_v4          | string   | Finapres measurement: Size of finger cuff (S, M or L) at visit 2. Visit 4. Derived using the formula: [besg_2_arm_1][finapres_finger_cuff_size_v2]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `finapres_minus20_v4`                   | finapres_minus20_v4                   | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 1, performed approximately 20 minutes prior to the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `bloodsample_minus15_v4`                | bloodsample_minus15_v4                | string   | Record whether the participant completed bloodsample measurement 1, performed approximately 15 minutes prior to the intervention. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `vas_minus10_v4`                        | vas_minus10_v4                        | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 1, performed approximately 10 minutes prior to the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `bloodsample_minus5_v4`                 | bloodsample_minus5_v4                 | string   | Records whether a bloodsample was taken at time -5. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `timer_started_v4`                      | timer_started_v4                      | string   | Record whether the timer was started at the time of test drink consumption (defined as time 0). Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `mmtt_shake_bar_v4`                     | mmtt_shake_bar_v4                     | string   | Record whether the participant completed both shake and bar. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `shake_bar_time_min_v4`                 | shake_bar_time_min_v4                 | string   | The number of minutes it took the participant to consume the test shake and bar, if the total consumption time exceeded 10 minutes. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `mmtt_shake_v4`                         | mmtt_shake_v4                         | string   | The amount of the shake the participant drank. Text field. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `mmtt_bar_v4`                           | mmtt_bar_v4                           | string   | The amount of the bar the participant ate. Text field. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `finapres_time15_v4`                    | finapres_time15_v4                    | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 2, performed approximately 15 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `bloodsample_time30_v4`                 | bloodsample_time30_v4                 | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 30. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `vas_time30_v4`                         | vas_time30_v4                         | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 2, performed approximately 30 minutes into the intervention. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `finapres_time45_v4`                    | finapres_time45_v4                    | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 3, performed approximately 45 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `bloodsample_time60_v4`                 | bloodsample_time60_v4                 | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 60. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `vas_time60_v4`                         | vas_time60_v4                         | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 3, performed approximately 60 minutes into the intervention. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `finapres_time75_v4`                    | finapres_time75_v4                    | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 4, performed approximately 75 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 4                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `bloodsample_time90_v4`                 | bloodsample_time90_v4                 | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 90. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `vas_time90_v4`                         | vas_time90_v4                         | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 4, performed approximately 90 minutes into the intervention. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `finapres_time105_v4`                   | finapres_time105_v4                   | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 5, performed approximately 105 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `bloodsample_time120_v4`                | bloodsample_time120_v4                | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 120. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `vas_time120_v4`                        | vas_time120_v4                        | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 5, performed approximately 120 minutes into the intervention. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `finapres_time135_v4`                   | finapres_time135_v4                   | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 6, performed approximately 135 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `bloodsample_time180_v4`                | bloodsample_time180_v4                | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 180. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `vas_time180_v4`                        | vas_time180_v4                        | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 6, performed approximately 180 minutes into the intervention. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `finapres_time195_v4`                   | finapres_time195_v4                   | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 7, performed approximately 195 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `bloodsample_time240_v4`                | bloodsample_time240_v4                | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken approximately 240 minutes into the intervention. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `vas_time240_v4`                        | vas_time240_v4                        | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 7, performed approximately 240 minutes into the intervention. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `finapres_time255_v4`                   | finapres_time255_v4                   | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 8, performed approximately 255 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `finapres_upload_ldrive_v4`             | finapres_upload_ldrive_v4             | string   | Indicates whetner or not the Finapres data is saved on the L-drive. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `survey_answered_v4`                    | survey_answered_v4                    | string   | Survey answered. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `food_v4`                               | food_v4                               | string   | Food delivered. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `scipd_performed_v4`                    | scipd_performed_v4                    | string   | Whether the participant completed SCIP-D. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `scip_list_test_v4`                     | scip_list_test_v4                     | number   | Whether the participant completed the scip list test. Visit 4                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `scip_consonant_test_v4`                | scip_consonant_test_v4                | number   | Whether the participant has completed the consonant test. Visit 4                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `scip_word_mobilizing_v4`               | scip_word_mobilizing_v4               | number   | Whether the participant completed the word mobilizing test. Visit 4                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `scip_delayed_recall_v4`                | scip_delayed_recall_v4                | number   | Whether the participant completed the recall test. Visit 4                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `scip_visuomotor_v4`                    | scip_visuomotor_v4                    | number   | Whether the participant completed the visomotor test. Visit 4                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `scip_upload_v4`                        | scip_upload_v4                        | string   | upload SCIP-D. Workflow. Visit 4                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `tmt_b_v4`                              | tmt_b_v4                              | string   | Whether the participant completed the trail making test. Visit 4                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `tmt_v4`                                | tmt_v4                                | string   | Time result for the TMT-B test in minutes and seconds. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `tmt_upload_v4`                         | tmt_upload_v4                         | string   | Upload TMT-B including timeframe. Workflow. Visit 4                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `cognition_tests_filed_office_v4`       | cognition_tests_filed_office_v4       | string   | Indicates if the SCIP test and the TMT test has been filed in the briefcase in the office. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `vo2max_done_v4`                        | vo2max_done_v4                        | string   | Indicates whether or not the participant finished the VO2 max test. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `vo2max_test_type_v4`                   | vo2max_test_type_v4                   | string   | Indicates what vo2 max protocol was used at the test. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `vo2max_seat_v4`                        | vo2max_seat_v4                        | number   | The seat adjustment for the vo2 max test. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `vo2max_time_length_v4`                 | vo2max_time_length_v4                 | number   | Indicates how long time the VO2 max test lasted. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `vo2max_outcome_v4`                     | vo2max_outcome_v4                     | string   | VO2 max in ml/min. Measured using a graded exercise test on a stationary cycle ergometer with gradually increasing resistance in 1-3 minute stages, until exhaustion. During the test, oxygen uptake is continuously measured using a metabolic cart connected to a breath-by-breath gas analysis system via a face mask. Heart rate is monitored using a heart rate monitor. Visit 4.                                                                                        |
| `vo2max_upload_ldrive_v4`               | vo2max_upload_ldrive_v4               | string   | Indicates whetner or not the VO2 max test is saved on the L-drive. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `vo2max_upload_v4`                      | vo2max_upload_v4                      | string   | VO2max data upload. Workflow. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `homeurin_deviation_v4`                 | homeurin_deviation_v4                 | string   | Record any deviations from protocol for the home urin test. Deviations include delay, missed sample, wrong tube, or insufficient volume. Applies to all items in this matrix. visit 4                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `stool_sample_deviation_v4`             | stool_sample_deviation_v4             | string   | Record any deviations from protocol for the stool sample. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `spit_sample_deviation_v4`              | spit_sample_deviation_v4              | string   | Record any deviations from protocol fot the spit sample. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `urin_sample_deviation_v4`              | urin_sample_deviation_v4              | string   | Record any deviations from protocol for the on site urin sample. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `whr_deviation_v4`                      | whr_deviation_v4                      | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during waist and hip measurement. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `dxa_deviation_v4`                      | dxa_deviation_v4                      | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during the DXA scan. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `food_preference_deviation_v4`          | food_preference_deviation_v4          | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during food preference test. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `fibro_deviation_v4`                    | fibro_deviation_v4                    | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during the fibroscan. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `blood_pressure_deviation_v4`           | blood_pressure_deviation_v4           | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during the blood pressure measurement. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `hba1c_deviation_v4`                    | hba1c_deviation_v4                    | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during the HbA1c measurem,ent. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `mmtt_blood_deviation_v4`               | mmtt_blood_deviation_v4               | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during the blood test during MMTT. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `finapres_deviation_v4`                 | finapres_deviation_v4                 | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during the Finapres during MMTT. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `vas_deviation_v4`                      | vas_deviation_v4                      | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during the VAS. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `medicin_deviation_v4`                  | medicin_deviation_v4                  | string   | Record any deviations from protocol going through the medication . Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `survey_deviation_v4`                   | survey_deviation_v4                   | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during the surveys/questinaries. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `cognition_deviation_v4`                | cognition_deviation_v4                | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during the cognition test. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `vo2max_deviation_v4`                   | vo2max_deviation_v4                   | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during the VO2 max test. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `other_deviation_v4`                    | other_deviation_v4                    | string   | Record any other deviations from protocol. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `homeurin_deviation_describe_v4`        | homeurin_deviation_describe_v4        | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the home urin collection. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `stoolsample_deviation_describe_v4`     | stoolsample_deviation_describe_v4     | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the stool sample.
