Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `spitsample_deviation_describe_v4`      | spitsample_deviation_describe_v4      | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the spit sample. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `urin_onsite_deviation_describe_v4`     | urin_onsite_deviation_describe_v4     | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the urine sample on site. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `whr_deviation_describe_v4`             | whr_deviation_describe_v4             | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the measurements of the waist hip ratio. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `dxa_deviation_describe_v4`             | dxa_deviation_describe_v4             | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the DXA scan. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `food_preference_deviation_describe_v4` | food_preference_deviation_describe_v4 | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the food preference test. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `fibro_deviation_describe_v4`           | fibro_deviation_describe_v4           | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the fibro scan. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `bp_deviation_describe_v4`              | bp_deviation_describe_v4              | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the measurements of the blood pressure. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `hba1c_deviation_describe_v4`           | hba1c_deviation_describe_v4           | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the HbA1c sample. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `mmtt_blood_deviation_describe_v4`      | mmtt_blood_deviation_describe_v4      | string   | Description of any deviations regarding blood samples during MMTT. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `finapres_deviation_describe_v4`        | finapres_deviation_describe_v4        | string   | Description of any deviations regarding finapres during MMTT. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `vas_deviation_describe_v4`             | vas_deviation_describe_v4             | string   | Description of any deviations regarding VAS. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `medicin_deviation_describe_v4`         | medicin_deviation_describe_v4         | string   | Description of any deviations regarding medicine. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `survey_deviation_describe_v4`          | survey_deviation_describe_v4          | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the surveys. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `cognition_deviation_describe_v4`       | cognition_deviation_describe_v4       | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the cognitive tests. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `vo2max_deviation_describe_v4`          | vo2max_deviation_describe_v4          | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the VO2 max test. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `other_deviation_describe_v4`           | other_deviation_describe_v4           | string   | Description of any other deviations from the protocol. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `group_meeting_dates_v4`                | group_meeting_dates_v4                | string   | Dates regarding group sessions. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `randomization_v4`                      | randomization_v4                      | string   | Whether the participant is randomized to one of the two intervention groups. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `comments_end_v4`                       | comments_end_v4                       | string   | Comment at the end of the visit. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `handed_out_v4___1`                     | Vægt                                  | boolean  | States if the participant has been handed scale, blood pressure monitor, and smartwatch. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `handed_out_v4___2`                     | Blodtryksapparat                      | boolean  | States if the participant has been handed scale, blood pressure monitor, and smartwatch. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `handed_out_v4___3`                     | Garminur                              | boolean  | States if the participant has been handed scale, blood pressure monitor, and smartwatch. Visit 4.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |

: Fields in the `besoegsdag_4` resource.
